title: aira pallida
intro: Aira pallida, also known as the red millet grass or red oat grass, is a perennial grass species native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Aira pallida include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and even help to lower blood pressure. Aira pallida can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
